message:
feat(doctor): Add telemetry database integrity checks

Implements comprehensive telemetry database diagnostics in `rch doctor`:

- New check_telemetry_database() validates database existence and health
- TelemetryStorage::integrity_check() runs SQLite PRAGMA integrity_check
- TelemetryStorage::stats() returns record counts and database size
- Verbose mode displays detailed statistics (snapshots, aggregates, etc.)

Also improves SQLite configuration for reliability:
- Explicit WAL autocheckpoint setting (1000 pages)
- Foreign keys enforcement enabled
- 5-second busy timeout for concurrent access
- Fix i64→u64 cast for COUNT(*) queries

This completes the diagnostics story: rch doctor now validates
the full system including hooks, daemon, workers, and telemetry.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
